recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Live at Red Rocks
recommendations.overview: Comedian Bill Burr sounds off on cancel culture, feminism, getting bad reviews from his wife and a life-changing epiphany during a fiery stand-up set.

recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Paper Tiger
recommendations.overview: Comedian Bill Burr talks male feminists, outrage culture, robot sex, and cultural appropriation in this standup comedy special shot in London.

recommendations.title: Reign Over Me
recommendations.overview: A man who lost his family in the September 11 attack on New York City runs into his old college roommate. Rekindling the friendship is the one thing that appears able to help the man recover from his grief.

recommendations.title: Black or White
recommendations.overview: A grieving widower is drawn into a custody battle over his granddaughter, whom he helped raise her entire life.

recommendations.title: Blankman
recommendations.overview: Darryl is a childlike man with a genius for inventing various gadgets out of junk. When he stumbles on a method to make his clothes bulletproof, he decides to use his skills to be the lowest budgeted superhero of all.

recommendations.title: The Upside of Anger
recommendations.overview: After her husband runs off with his secretary, Terry Wolfmeyer is left to fend for herself -- and her four daughters. As she hits rock bottom, Terry finds a friend and drinking buddy in next-door neighbor Denny, a former baseball player. As the two g

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Bad Genius
recommendations.overview: Lynn, a brilliant student, after helping her friends to get the grades they need, develops the idea of starting a much bigger exam-cheating business.

recommendations.title: Barton Fink
recommendations.overview: A renowned New York playwright is enticed to California to write for the movies and discovers the hellish truth of Hollywood.

recommendations.title: Stranger Than Fiction
recommendations.overview: Harold Crick is a lonely IRS agent whose mundane existence is transformed when he hears a mysterious voice narrating his life.
